title: DBAF alpha sensitivity on Qwen-2.5-7B W4A4 (RTN+DBAF), full grid
config: W4A4 (W and A folded with same alpha), per-tensor symmetric INT4, qmax=7
metrics: wikitext2 PPL (wt2), C4 PPL (c4) — raw, lower better

0.02.note: catastrophic — analytic-MSE optimum amplifies unfold noise (consistent with LLaMA α=0.02 = 6.55e5)

notes: Confirms LLaMA-3-8B α-sweep pattern on a harder model: U-shape with minimum at α=0.25, catastrophic at α=0.02 (analytic optimum, where unfold noise dominates), monotone increasing for α≥0.25. Qwen-2.5-7B is much more sensitive than LLaMA-3-8B because of its 10× more leptokurtic activations (mean kurtosis 961 vs 95). Generated locally on A100 by /tmp/qwen_alpha_sweep.sh.
